stream_summary: Comprehensive unit tests for StepDefinition and DevinWrapper changes. Tests cover happy path, edge cases, and error scenarios.

related_acceptance_criteria.criterion: Step definition can include optional 'agent_config' field pointing to a config file
related_acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given a step.json with 'agent_config': 'agent-config.json', When the step is executed, Then DevinWrapper uses that config file

related_acceptance_criteria.criterion: If step has no agent_config, fall back to global .devin/agent-config.json
related_acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given a step.json without 'agent_config' field, When the step is executed, Then DevinWrapper uses .devin/agent-config.json

related_acceptance_criteria.criterion: Step-specific agent-config is resolved relative to step directory
related_acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given a step in steps/my-step/ with agent_config: 'agent-config.json', When the path is resolved, Then it resolves to steps/my-step/agent-config.json

related_edge_cases.criterion: Given agent_config: '', When step executes, Then global config is used
Given agent_config: null, When step executes, Then global config is used
Given agent_config: '../other-step/agent-config.json', When resolved, Then it points to correct location

dependencies: 01-core-implementation: Must complete StepDefinition and DevinWrapper changes first

stream_steps.title: Write Unit Tests for StepDefinition
stream_steps.description: Comprehensive unit tests for StepDefinition changes
tasks: Test path resolution - edge cases (../, empty, null)
acceptance_criteria: Coverage includes happy path and edge cases

stream_steps.title: Write Unit Tests for DevinWrapper
stream_steps.description: Unit tests for DevinWrapper command building changes
tasks: Test command building with step-specific config
Test command building without step-specific config
acceptance_criteria: Tests verify step-specific config is used

relevant_context.relevance: Existing test file where new tests should be added
Follow existing test structure and naming conventions
Testing framework used in the project

success_criteria: Coverage includes happy path and edge cases
Tests are independent and can run in any order
Tests follow existing patterns and style
notes: Unit tests can run in parallel with validation workstream. Must be completed before integration testing.
